assertions.description: KiCad 5 .sch parser correctly extracts all 43 component references matching the source file. Type breakdown matches v1.4: resistor=16, capacitor=12, connector=6, ic=4, led=2, switch=1, inductor=1, test_point=1. The v1.3 and v1.4 schematics are equivalent designs.

INCORRECT: The KiCad 5 legacy parser also produces components with 'reference' key (not 'ref'). All 43 component entries have .get('ref') == None. The correct values are accessible via .get('reference'). The same schema inconsistency is present across both parsers.
